notice: Daily verified edition. Official sources only. 'Newly published today' is separated from 'historical backfill / first discovered today'; expired or eligibility-mismatched listings are excluded.

items.title: 认知与临床神经科学硕士
items.title_en: MSc Cognitive and Clinical Neuroscience
items.summary: 2026 年 9 月入学、全日制一年。国际申请截止 8 月 1 日；非心理学背景可通过个人陈述说明兴趣与可迁移能力。
items.summary_en: A one-year MSc starting in September 2026. The international deadline is 1 August; applicants from other disciplines may evidence relevant interest and transferable skills.
items.relevance: 截止时间临近；应优先核对语言、推荐信、成绩单和签证办理周期。

items.title: 香港大学禅修／正念神经影像与大数据实验室科研助理 I/II
items.title_en: Research Assistant I/II — Contemplative Neuroimaging and Big Data
items.organization: The University of Hong Kong · Centre of Buddhist Studies
items.summary: 一年期全职岗位，可续约；研究禅修、正念、注意和情绪调节的神经机制。工作包括建立数据分析管线、统计／大数据分析、数据管理，以及 EEG、fNIRS、ECG、PPG 等多模态信号的采集、预处理和分析。要求心理学、神经科学、生物医学工程或相关本科及以上，Python、R 或 MATLAB 编程，以及神经影像／生理数据处理经验；资历或经验较低者可按 RA I/II 考虑。中英文（含粤语、普通话）为“优先”而非明确硬性要求。申请滚动审查，招满即止。
items.summary_en: A one-year, renewable full-time role studying neural correlates of meditation, mindfulness, attention and emotion regulation. Work spans analysis-pipeline development, statistics/big-data analysis, data management, and collection/preprocessing/analysis of EEG, fNIRS, ECG and PPG. A bachelor's degree in psychology, neuroscience, biomedical engineering or a related field, Python/R/MATLAB skills and hands-on multimodal-data experience are sought; candidates with lower qualifications or less experience may be appointed at RA I/II level. Chinese including Cantonese and Putonghua is preferred rather than stated as mandatory. Review is rolling until filled.
items.relevance: 与计算神经科学、神经影像、编程和注意／情绪研究高度贴合；真正门槛是已有多模态数据处理经历，语言要求比多数 HKU 教育学院岗位更柔性，值得优先核对。

items.title: 香港大学言语、语言与阅读实验室全职科研助理 II
items.title_en: Full-time Research Assistant II — Speech, Language and Reading Lab
items.summary: 一年期全职科研助理，可续约。研究结合心理学、认知神经科学、AI、语言学与计算建模，工作涉及儿童心理语言与认知评估、行为干预以及统计／计算分析。要求相关专业本科及以上、粤英双语、行为实验与数据分析经验；Python、R、MATLAB 或 Praat 为加分项。
items.summary_en: A one-year, renewable RA II role spanning psychology, cognitive neuroscience, AI, linguistics and computational modelling. Work includes child psycholinguistic/cognitive assessment, behavioural intervention and advanced quantitative analysis. A relevant bachelor's degree, Cantonese-English bilingual proficiency and behavioural/data-analysis experience are required; Python, R, MATLAB or Praat are advantageous.
items.relevance: 主题和工具匹配度高，也明确适合考虑后续研究生学习的人；但粤语能力是实质门槛，应先据此决定是否投递。

items.title: 香港大学教育学院听力健康管理全职科研助理 I（2 名）
items.title_en: Full-time Research Assistant I — Hearing Health Management (2 posts)
items.organization: The University of Hong Kong · Faculty of Education
items.summary: 一年期全职科研助理，2026 年 11 月 1 日开始，可续约。接受任何专业本科，经验为加分项但并非必需；申请者需在 Python 软件工程、文献综述、英文校对、SPSS 统计或 NVivo/SPSS 数据分析中至少具备一项能力。工作包括资料检索、访谈、数据收集分析和转写。要求英语及熟练粤语，申请收到即审、招满即止。
items.summary_en: A one-year, renewable RA I appointment starting 1 November 2026. Any bachelor's discipline is accepted and prior experience is advantageous but not required. Applicants should offer at least one of: Python software engineering, literature review, English proofreading, SPSS statistics, or NVivo/SPSS data analysis. Duties include searches, interviews, data collection/analysis and transcription. English and proficient Cantonese are required; applications are reviewed on receipt.
items.relevance: 层级、专业限制和经验要求都较友好，并连接 Python、统计与医疗研究；粤语是决定能否投递的实质门槛。

items.title: Concept2Brain：从文字或图片生成可复现的合成 EEG 反应
items.title_en: Concept2Brain: an AI model for predicting neurophysiological responses to text and pictures
items.location: 计算神经科学／生成式神经建模
items.summary: 研究提出深度网络 Concept2Brain，利用 CLIP 等模型把文字或图片的语义／情绪表征映射到电生理潜在空间，从而预测与实测相似的 EEG 反应；作者同时开放网页工具，用于生成可复现的合成 EEG 数据。其价值在于连接多模态 AI、刺激表征和神经编码。局限是“像真实 EEG”并不等于模型复现了大脑的因果机制；对训练分布外概念、人群差异和下游科学结论的可靠性仍需独立验证。
items.summary_en: Concept2Brain uses a deep network, including CLIP-derived stimulus representations, to map semantic and emotional information from text or pictures into an electrophysiological latent space and generate EEG-like responses. An open web service supports reproducible synthetic datasets. Its main limitation is that resemblance to recorded EEG does not establish a causal model of the brain; out-of-distribution concepts, individual variability and downstream scientific validity require independent testing.
items.relevance: 这是 AI 与计算神经科学交叉度最高的新论文之一，也可作为神经数据生成、表征学习和科研工程方向的项目线索。

items.title: 香港大学教育学院全职科研助理 II（儿童言语／语言与数据分析）
items.title_en: Full-Time Research Assistant II — Child Speech, Language and Data Analysis
items.organization: The University of Hong Kong · Faculty of Education
items.summary: 3 或 6 个月临时全职岗位，表现合格可续约。接受任何专业本科；要求粤语及英语，并具备儿童言语／语言工作、文献综述、英文校对、粤语语音转写或 Praat、SPSS、R 数据分析中的一项或多项能力。工作包括资料检索、访谈、数据收集分析、转写与翻译；经验为加分项但并非必需。
items.summary_en: A three- or six-month full-time temporary RA II role, renewable subject to performance. Applicants may hold a bachelor's degree in any discipline and should have Cantonese and English plus capability in one or more of: work with children with speech/language disorders, literature review, English proofreading, Cantonese phonetic transcription, or data analysis with Praat, SPSS and R. Experience is advantageous but not required.
items.relevance: 层级和技能要求较适合入门申请，且明确不强制既往经验；粤语是实质门槛。申请收到即审、招满即止，虽属历史补录仍应尽快判断。

items.title: 语言模型语义距离揭示知识检索困难时三类脑网络的协同
items.title_en: Model-based semantic distance reveals adaptive coordination of distinct cognitive systems in flexible knowledge retrieval
items.summary: 研究用 AI 语言模型量化概念间的语义距离，并结合脑成像追踪知识检索难度；结果显示一个神经指标随相关概念的可检索性变化，且检索越困难，三个认知系统之间的协同越强。方法把现代语义嵌入与记忆检索机制连接起来。局限是结论依赖所用语言模型和任务对“语义距离”的定义，fMRI 网络协同主要是相关证据，是否能泛化到开放式现实知识检索仍待检验。
items.summary_en: AI language models were used to quantify semantic distance between concepts and link it to neuroimaging during flexible knowledge retrieval. A neural signature tracked retrieval ease, while three cognitive systems coordinated more strongly as retrieval became demanding. Limits include dependence on the chosen embedding/model and task definition, correlational fMRI evidence, and uncertain generalisation to open-ended real-world retrieval.
items.relevance: 直接连接语义记忆、计算表征、语言模型与大尺度网络协作，适合计算认知路线。

items.title: 香港大学公共卫生实验室科学科研助理 I/II（多个岗位）
items.title_en: Research Assistant I/II — Public Health Laboratory Sciences (several posts)
items.organization: The University of Hong Kong · School of Public Health
items.summary: 一年期全职岗位，可续约。接受细胞／分子生物学、基因组学、生命科学、生物技术等本科或硕士；病毒学、免疫学、分子克隆、细胞实验及组学数据生物信息分析经验均为加分项。工作同时包含实验、数据分析解释、记录和实验室运营支持。申请滚动审查、招满即止。
items.summary_en: A one-year, renewable RA I/II appointment for bachelor's or master's graduates in cell/molecular biology, genomics, life sciences, biotechnology or related fields. Experience in virology, immunology, cloning, cell assays and bioinformatics analysis of omics data is advantageous. Duties combine bench experiments, analysis and interpretation, record keeping and basic laboratory operations. Applications are reviewed on a rolling basis until filled.
items.relevance: 层级和生命科学背景要求较可达，并包含组学分析入口；但主体仍是病毒学／细胞分子湿实验，不能当作纯生物信息岗位。应在确有实验基础或愿意回到湿实验时优先考虑。

items.title: 从认知地图进行神经采样，可生成面向目标的想象与规划
items.title_en: Neural sampling from cognitive maps enables goal-directed imagination and planning
items.location: 计算认知／脑启发式 AI
items.summary: 研究把认知地图、随机采样和组合编码整合成透明的神经网络模型。模型通过局部、自监督的突触可塑性在线学习正向与逆向映射，无需反向传播；它能在二维空间、抽象图和组合轮廓任务中生成多条接近最优的目标路径，并对未经历状态和新障碍进行泛化。局限是主要证据来自计算模拟，与啮齿动物海马回放的对应多为定性，尚未直接验证大脑是否采用该算法。
items.summary_en: The study combines cognitive maps, stochastic sampling and compositional coding in a transparent neural network that learns forward and inverse mappings online through local self-supervised plasticity without backpropagation. It generates diverse near-optimal goal paths in spatial, abstract-graph and compositional tasks, including unseen states and new barriers. The main limitation is that evidence is computational and correspondence with hippocampal replay is largely qualitative rather than a direct test of the brain's algorithm.
items.relevance: 直接连接 grid/place-cell 认知地图、海马回放、规划、组合泛化和低功耗脑启发式 AI，是本轮方向匹配度最高的研究。

items.title: 人类学习率同时在快、慢两个时间尺度上适应
items.title_en: Two time scales of adaptation in human learning rates
items.summary: 两项实验让参与者在六种统计环境中完成连续估计任务，并用计算模型分离区块内快速学习率调整与环境特异的慢速元学习。再次进入某环境时，首个试次就保留相应学习率；fMRI 表征相似性分析显示中央眶额皮层模式与这种全局学习率相关，预测误差信号则分布于包括腹侧纹状体在内的网络。局限是人工任务的生态效度有限，OFC 表征属于相关性证据而非因果检验。eLife 评价为“有价值、证据令人信服”。
items.summary_en: Across two experiments, participants performed a continuous-estimation task in six statistical environments. Computational modelling separated fast within-block learning-rate adjustment from slower environment-specific meta-learning; the first trial on returning to an environment retained its global rate. fMRI representational similarity linked central orbitofrontal patterns to these rates, with prediction-error signals distributed across a network including ventral striatum. Limits are the artificial task and correlational rather than causal OFC evidence. eLife rates the work valuable with convincing evidence.
items.relevance: 与强化学习、元学习、预测误差、OFC 和计算建模高度相关。

items.title: 功能肌肉网络可区分卒中运动损伤程度和康复响应
items.title_en: Functional muscle networks as biomarkers of post-stroke motor impairment and therapeutic responsiveness
items.location: 运动神经科学／sEMG／康复数据分析
items.summary: 研究分析 42 名卒中患者在 20 次上肢训练前后的 16 肌肉 sEMG，用网络信息框架、互信息、社区检测、非负矩阵分解和聚类区分冗余与协同肌肉网络。网络特征可分层运动损伤和治疗响应；从冗余转向协同与较好恢复相关。局限包括样本较小、VR 与常规治疗组严重不平衡、主要依据粗大运动量表，且缺少独立外部验证。eLife 评价为“重要、证据扎实”。
items.summary_en: The study analysed 16-muscle sEMG from 42 stroke survivors before and after 20 upper-limb training sessions. A network-information framework combining mutual information, community detection, non-negative matrix factorisation and clustering separated redundant from synergistic muscle networks and stratified impairment and treatment response. A redundancy-to-synergy shift marked better recovery. Limits include the small sample, strongly imbalanced VR versus conventional-therapy groups, reliance on gross motor outcomes and no independent external validation. eLife rates the work important with solid evidence.
items.relevance: 直接连接时序生理数据、网络分析、康复评估和医疗科技，是从科研分析走向临床算法应用的良好案例。

items.title: 香港大学脑刺激与吞咽障碍全职科研助理 II
items.title_en: Full-time Research Assistant II — Brain Stimulation and Swallowing Disorders
items.summary: 一年期全职岗位，协助脑刺激与吞咽障碍研究，包括文献检索、受试者招募、数据采集分析与报告。接受神经科学、生物科学等相关本科背景，明确欢迎应届毕业生；要求中英文及粤语、统计分析和较强组织沟通能力。
items.summary_en: A one-year full-time role supporting research on brain stimulation and swallowing disorders through literature review, recruitment, data collection, analysis and reporting. Relevant bachelor's graduates are eligible and fresh graduates are explicitly welcome; Chinese, English and spoken Cantonese are required.
items.relevance: 层级合适且明确欢迎应届生；核心障碍仍是粤语和临床受试者协调工作占比。

items.title: 计算机科学 Align 硕士
items.title_en: Align MS in Computer Science
items.summary: 专为非计算机背景申请者设计，前两个学期补足计算机基础，再进入 AI、人机交互、网络安全等方向；官网当前提供申请入口。
items.summary_en: Designed for applicants without a CS background, with two foundation semesters before specialisations including AI, HCI and cybersecurity.
items.relevance: 跨专业转向计算机的明确桥梁项目；需重点评估总学费、校区与就业签证。

items.title: 神经网络自由回忆模型自发学出多种记忆策略
items.title_en: A neural network model of free recall learns multiple memory strategies
items.summary: 研究训练神经网络执行自由回忆任务，发现模型可形成多种检索机制，并非都依赖经典的“时间情境”。表现最佳的模型形成了与刺激身份无关、强调项目学习位置的索引编码，建立类似“记忆宫殿”的顺序检索支架；当训练目标要求尽量回忆全部项目、且不能依赖近因效应时，这类策略更容易出现。局限是这是优化模型而非对人脑机制的直接测量；模型与人类行为模式相似，不能单独证明人脑采用同一表征。
items.summary_en: Neural networks optimized for free recall developed multiple retrieval strategies rather than a single temporal-context mechanism. The best-performing models learned a stimulus-invariant index code for studied position, creating a sequential scaffold analogous to a memory palace; this strategy emerged more often when training rewarded recalling all items and blocked reliance on recency. The main limitation is that optimized model representations are not direct evidence of the mechanism used by the human brain.
items.relevance: 同时连接自由回忆、计算建模、表征学习与认知启发式 AI，是本轮与计算认知最直接的新论文。

items.title: 成人到婴儿的单向神经耦合中介了选择性社会学习
items.title_en: Adult-to-infant unidirectional neural coupling mediates selective social learning in infants from the United Kingdom and Singapore
items.location: 发展认知神经科学／跨文化社会学习
items.summary: 英国与新加坡婴儿队列学习人工语言时，成人说话者的眼神接触调节了“成人→婴儿”的单向神经耦合；该耦合中介了完整眼神接触条件下的选择性学习，而且比婴儿自身神经活动更能预测学习结果。跨地区重复提高了稳健性。局限是人工语言与受控眼神范式未必覆盖真实互动，耦合和中介分析也不能单独证明神经因果传递；当前公开稿仍为未完成文字编辑的早期版本。
items.summary_en: In infant cohorts from the UK and Singapore learning an artificial language, speaker eye contact modulated unidirectional adult-to-infant neural coupling. This coupling mediated selective learning under full eye contact and predicted learning better than infant neural activity alone. Cross-site replication strengthens the result. Limits include the artificial-language and controlled-gaze paradigms, the non-causal nature of coupling/mediation analyses, and the currently unedited early public version.
items.relevance: 连接发展神经科学、社会注意、语言学习、跨脑耦合与跨文化重复。

items.title: 数据驱动分型揭示精神病性障碍相反的皮层与细胞特征
items.title_en: Subtyping psychotic disorders using a data-driven approach reveals divergent cortical and cellular signatures
items.location: 精神病学／结构 MRI／数据驱动分型
items.summary: 研究对 381 名精神病性障碍患者的结构 MRI 使用相似性网络融合，得到跨诊断的两种亚型：一型表现为额顶叶表面积和背侧纹状体体积中度增大，另一型则在额颞叶及海马、杏仁核、丘脑和纹状体明显减小，且负性症状与认知受损更重。作者再将影像空间模式与 Allen 脑图谱推断的细胞类型分布关联。局限是亚型来自单一总体、效应与健康人仍大量重叠，细胞结果是空间推断而非患者组织测量，外部稳定性和临床效用尚未证实。
items.summary_en: Similarity network fusion of structural MRI from 381 people with psychotic disorders identified two transdiagnostic subtypes: one with moderately enlarged frontoparietal surface area and dorsal striatum, and another with smaller frontotemporal surface area plus hippocampal, amygdala, thalamic and striatal volumes and worse negative/cognitive symptoms. Imaging maps were related to cell-type distributions imputed from the Allen Human Brain Atlas. Limits include derivation in one broad cohort, substantial overlap with controls, spatially inferred rather than patient-measured cellular signals, and unproven external stability or clinical utility.
items.relevance: 展示了结构影像、无监督分型、跨诊断精神病学和转录组空间映射的完整计算路线。

items.title: 经颅聚焦超声在灵长类丘脑中同时调节放电、LFP 与 BOLD
items.title_en: Transcranial focused ultrasound modulates spiking, LFP, and BOLD activity in the primate thalamus
items.location: 神经调控／灵长类电生理与 fMRI
items.summary: 研究在猕猴丘脑与岛叶系统中结合单单位放电、局部场电位和 fMRI，发现低强度聚焦超声可产生局部 BOLD 增强，并优先改变丘脑 VPL 的 delta、theta、alpha 活动及放电；从岛叶远程刺激也能调节丘脑。三类信号的空间变化高度对应，超声反应峰值比振动触觉刺激更慢。局限包括非人灵长类样本与特定参数范围，机制和临床有效性仍不能由本研究单独确定；部分作者持有相关专利申请。
items.summary_en: In macaque thalamus–insula circuits, simultaneous single-unit, LFP and fMRI measurements showed that low-intensity focused ultrasound elicited localized BOLD increases and preferentially modulated delta, theta and alpha LFPs plus VPL spiking; remote insular stimulation also affected thalamus. Spatial changes aligned across modalities and peaked more slowly than vibrotactile responses. Limits include the non-human-primate model, a specific parameter range and unresolved clinical efficacy; several authors are co-inventors on a related patent application.
items.relevance: 为深部非侵入神经调控提供跨尺度验证，尤其适合关注神经刺激、电生理与成像信号关系的方向。

items.title: 跨数据集机器学习识别睡眠剥夺的脑连接特征
items.title_en: A neural signature of sleep deprivation in the human brain
items.summary: 研究用机器学习和大型神经影像数据建立睡眠剥夺脑特征，并在多个独立、包含实验与现实情境的数据集中验证。该特征能检测一晚恢复睡眠后的残留扰动、部分睡眠剥夺及普通人群自然睡眠时长差异，并定位较易受影响或较快恢复的分布式连接模式。局限是预测标记不等同于机制，数据集与扫描条件差异、潜在混杂及个体层面的临床可用性仍需进一步检验；公开稿尚未完成文字编辑。
items.summary_en: Machine learning on large neuroimaging datasets produced a connectivity signature that generalised across independent experimental and real-world samples. It detected residual effects after one recovery night, partial deprivation and natural sleep-duration variation, while highlighting vulnerable and rapidly normalising networks. A predictive marker is not a mechanism, and dataset/scanner heterogeneity, confounding and individual clinical utility remain open; the public version is not yet copy-edited.
items.relevance: 是神经影像机器学习、跨数据集验证和可泛化生物标记设计的实用案例。

items.title: 认知与计算神经科学硕士
items.title_en: MSc Cognitive and Computational Neuroscience
items.summary: 官网显示 2026 入学申请开放。课程包含计算建模、数据分析、神经影像与 AI，并以研究项目收束。
items.summary_en: Applications are open for 2026 entry. The programme covers computational modelling, data analysis, neuroimaging and AI, culminating in a research project.
items.relevance: 同时覆盖神经科学与计算方法，是本期方向匹配度较高的项目；需确认剩余名额与国际申请周期。

items.title: 人工智能 Align 硕士
items.title_en: Align MS in Artificial Intelligence
items.summary: 面向非计算机专业申请者，通过学术桥梁课程达到研究生层级的计算机与 AI 基础。
items.summary_en: An AI master's built for non-CS majors, using an academic bridge before graduate-level computer science and AI study.
items.relevance: 比通用 CS 更直接指向算法与 AI，但应比较课程深度、成本及入门岗位门槛。

items.title: 青春期迷幻剂暴露通过海马—前额叶同步紊乱造成持续竞争回避
items.title_en: Adolescent exposure to the psychedelic 25C-NBOMe in rats induces lasting competitive avoidance through disrupted hippocampal–prefrontal synchrony
items.location: 系统神经科学／社会行为
items.summary: 雄性大鼠在青春期反复接触 25C-NBOMe 后，成年期出现持续的竞争回避；成年期暴露没有同样效应，变化也不能由一般社交性或支配地位解释。多位点记录显示腹侧海马—眶额皮层 theta 相干性下降最能预测该行为；化学遗传学激活该投射可纠正回避，抑制则可在对照动物中诱发回避。局限是仅研究雄性大鼠和一种特定药物／暴露方案，不能直接外推到人类青少年或其他迷幻剂。
items.summary_en: Repeated adolescent—but not adult—25C-NBOMe exposure in male rats produced lasting competitive avoidance that was not explained by general sociability or dominance. Multisite recordings identified reduced ventral-hippocampus–orbitofrontal theta coherence as the strongest circuit correlate; chemogenetic activation normalized avoidance, while inhibition induced it in controls. Translation is limited by the male-rat model, one compound and one repeated-exposure regime.
items.relevance: 将发育阶段、社会行为、默认网络同步、theta 节律和投射因果操控连接起来，方法链完整。

items.title: 双敲除显示非典型 PKC 对海马长期增强和空间长时记忆的维持至关重要
items.title_en: PKMζ-PKCι/λ double-knockout demonstrates atypical PKC is crucial for the persistence of hippocampal LTP and spatial memory
items.location: 突触可塑性／长期记忆／小鼠遗传学
items.summary: 研究解决 PKMζ 敲除小鼠仍保留海马 LTP 与空间记忆的补偿争议：PKCι/λ 在 PKMζ 缺失时持续上调；同时删除两种非典型 PKC 后，海马晚期 LTP 和空间长时记忆消失，而短时记忆相对保留，支持两者可互相补偿并共同维持长期可塑性。局限是小鼠遗传敲除可能引入发育／补偿效应，不能直接外推到正常人类记忆维持。eLife 评价为“重要、证据令人信服”。
items.summary_en: The study addresses why PKMζ-knockout mice retain hippocampal LTP and spatial memory: PKCι/λ becomes persistently upregulated when PKMζ is absent. Removing both atypical PKCs abolishes late hippocampal LTP and spatial long-term memory while relatively sparing short-term memory, supporting mutual compensation in persistent plasticity. Mouse genetic knockouts may introduce developmental or compensatory effects and cannot be directly extrapolated to normal human memory. eLife rates the study important with convincing evidence.
items.relevance: 为长期记忆的分子维持机制和遗传补偿问题提供关键证据。

items.title: 计算机科学硕士／博士 2027 招生
items.title_en: Computer Science Master's and Doctoral Admissions — AY 2027
items.summary: 信息理工研究科已发布 2027 学年计算机科学硕博招生指南入口；TOEFL 替代英语考试，多数研究科课程自 2026 年 4 月起以英语授课。
items.summary_en: The graduate school has published its AY 2027 admissions route; TOEFL replaces the English exam and most graduate lectures moved to English from April 2026.
items.relevance: 亚洲地区当前可核验的 2027 招生节点；需细查数学考试与研究室要求。

items.title: 深浅皮层在声音预测、比较与适应中承担不同角色
items.title_en: Distinct Roles of Deep and Superficial Cortical Layers in Tone Prediction, Comparison, and Adaptation in Human Auditory Cortices
items.summary: 研究让参与者聆听可预测性与重复结构不同的随机音调序列，并用 7T fMRI 将反应拆分到深、中、浅三个皮层深度。深层最突出地携带预期相关信号，浅层更体现刺激偏好与预期的共同解释量，而重复抑制在各深度较均一。限制是期刊当前提供的是尚未完成文字编辑的早期公开版本，且层析 fMRI 的推断仍依赖深度分箱和血流信号。
items.summary_en: Using 7T fMRI during stochastic tone sequences, the study separated expectation, stimulus-preference and repetition-suppression variance across cortical depth. Deep layers most strongly carried expectation signals, superficial layers reflected prediction-input alignment, and repetition suppression was depth-invariant. The current public manuscript is unedited, and laminar-fMRI inference remains dependent on depth binning and haemodynamic signals.
items.relevance: 对预测编码、皮层层级计算和高场神经影像方法都有直接参考价值。

items.title: 香港大学微生物学系科研助理 I（分子诊断与 NGS）
items.title_en: Research Assistant I — Molecular Diagnostics and NGS
items.organization: The University of Hong Kong · Department of Microbiology
items.summary: 两年期全职岗位，可续约；研究病毒、细菌和真菌诊断及新发传染病。接受生物／生物医学科学、生物技术或相关本科；分子诊断和 NGS 文库制备经验为加分项，但岗位明确要求能够排查分子检测及文库制备问题。要求粤语、英语和普通话沟通能力。
items.summary_en: A two-year, renewable RA I role on viral, bacterial and fungal diagnostics and emerging infectious diseases. A bachelor's degree in biological/biomedical sciences, biotechnology or a related field is accepted. Molecular-diagnostics and NGS-library experience is advantageous, but the appointee must be able to troubleshoot molecular assays and library preparation. Cantonese, English and Mandarin communication are required.
items.relevance: 是分子诊断、NGS 与感染病研发入口，但并非零经验生信岗；实验故障排查和粤语构成实际门槛，适配度低于公共卫生 RA I/II。

items.title: 认知神经科学研究型硕士（2027 入学观察）
items.title_en: Research Master's in Cognitive Neuroscience — 2027 Entry Watch
items.summary: 两年制、全英文、选择性研究型硕士，设语言与交流、知觉／行动／决策、发展与终身可塑性、自然计算与神经技术四个方向。国际申请接受生物学、自然科学、AI、医学等研究型大学本科背景；项目建议具备微积分、统计及 MATLAB/Python。2026 非欧盟轮次已结束，下一学年申请通常自 10 月 1 日开放，2027 截止日仍待官网确认。
items.summary_en: A selective two-year English-taught research master's at the Donders Institute, with tracks in Language and Communication; Perception, Action and Decision-making; Development and Lifelong Plasticity; and Natural Computing and Neurotechnology. International applicants from biology, natural sciences, AI, medicine and related research-university degrees may enter the selection procedure; calculus, statistics and MATLAB/Python are recommended. The 2026 non-EU cycle is closed, and applications for the following academic year normally open on 1 October; the 2027 deadline is not yet confirmed.
items.relevance: Donders Institute 的认知神经科学训练和研究设施较强，且官网明确接受生物学／自然科学背景；属于 2027 准备项，不是当前可提交项目。不同方向的数学、物理和认知课程门槛差异较大，需按成绩单逐项核对。

items.title: 重复加工的行为促进可能由更早结束、功率增强的神经振荡支持
items.title_en: Repetition-related reductions in neural activity support improved behavior through increases in oscillatory power
items.location: 认知神经科学／同步 EEG-fMRI
items.summary: 研究在人类物体命名任务中同步采集 EEG 与 fMRI。重复出现后，额叶和枕颞叶的刺激诱发振荡从 gamma 到 theta 均表现为功率增加并更早结束，而同一区域的 BOLD 活动呈重复抑制；gamma 功率变化还与行为启动效应及左额叶 fMRI 抑制相关。作者据此提出同步与促进模型的混合解释。局限是相关关系不能单独确立振荡变化对行为改善的因果性，任务与刺激范围也较窄。
items.summary_en: During human object naming with simultaneous EEG-fMRI, repetition increased stimulus-driven oscillatory power from gamma to theta and caused it to resolve earlier in frontal and occipitotemporal regions that showed fMRI repetition suppression. Gamma changes correlated with behavioral priming and left-frontal BOLD suppression, supporting a mixture of Synchrony and Facilitation accounts. The correlational design does not establish that oscillatory changes cause behavioral improvement, and the task/stimulus domain is limited.
items.relevance: 把重复抑制、行为启动、跨频振荡与同步 EEG-fMRI 统一到同一实验中，方法和理论均与认知神经科学高度相关。

items.title: “压缩式学习”利用高阶网络结构促进知识获取
items.title_en: Compressive learning scaffolds higher-order network structure to enhance human knowledge acquisition
items.summary: 研究提出压缩式学习框架：在正式学习前，让路径突出网络节点度的不均一结构。行为、MEG 与两阶段计算模型共同显示，这种预学习可形成便于吸收新输入的网络“骨架”，并增强背侧前扣带皮层中的结构化表征。限制是任务采用人工网络结构，向现实学习材料的迁移仍需进一步验证。
items.summary_en: The study introduces compressive learning: pre-learning trajectories highlight degree inhomogeneity before new material is acquired. Behaviour, MEG and two-stage modelling suggest this builds a network skeleton that facilitates later learning and strengthens structured representations in dorsal ACC. Generalisation from artificial networks to real-world learning remains to be tested.
items.relevance: 连接网络科学、计算模型、MEG 与知识学习，是计算认知方向较强的新结果。

items.title: 跨视角人脸身份识别主要依赖稳定的水平信息
items.title_en: The view tolerance of human identity recognition depends on horizontal face information
items.location: 视觉认知／心理物理与观察者模型
items.summary: 研究让 22 名年轻成人识别不同偏航角、并经方向滤波的人脸，再用图像观察者模型区分“同视角最有诊断性的信息”和“跨视角最稳定的信息”。同视角诊断线索会从正脸的水平信息逐渐转向侧脸的垂直信息，但人类表现仍主要依赖水平成分；跨视角模型也显示水平信息最稳定。eLife 评价为“重要、证据令人信服”。局限包括样本较小，刺激为受控的灰度白人中性脸，真实场景、光照变化及生物实现仍待验证。
items.summary_en: Twenty-two young adults recognized identities across yaw angles using orientation-filtered faces, while image-based observer models separated view-selective diagnostic cues from view-tolerant stable cues. Diagnostic information shifted from horizontal in frontal faces toward vertical in profile views, yet human recognition remained primarily tuned to horizontal content; the view-tolerant model likewise found horizontal cues most stable. eLife rates the study important with convincing evidence. Limits include the small sample and controlled grayscale neutral-face stimuli, leaving ecological generalization and biological implementation open.
items.relevance: 对视觉表征不变性、人脸识别与计算模型约束有直接意义，也适合连接认知科学与计算机视觉。

items.title: 社区认知障碍筛查可按主观、数字测试与血液标志物分层
items.title_en: Adaptive pathways for multimodal community-based detection of cognitive impairment: the CogScreen I study
items.location: 认知老化／数字健康／血液标志物
items.summary: 慕尼黑社区中心的整群随机研究纳入 473 名有主观认知担忧的 60 岁以上成人，比较问卷、数字认知测试及加入 Aβ、pTau181、GFAP、NfL 血液标志物的分层流程。三种方式总体可行且可接受，数字测试与生物标志物提供不同潜在维度，探索性聚类产生低、中、高风险画像。局限是样本教育程度较高且为主动参与者、家庭医生参与不足、分层模型仍属假设生成，未验证长期诊断或预防效果。
items.summary_en: A cluster-randomised community study enrolled 473 adults aged 60+ with subjective cognitive concerns and compared questionnaire-only screening, digital cognitive testing and additional blood biomarkers including Aβ, pTau181, GFAP and NfL. Feasibility and acceptability were high, while digital and biological measures captured distinct dimensions and exploratory clustering suggested low-, intermediate- and high-risk profiles. Limits include a highly educated self-selected sample, limited GP engagement, a hypothesis-generating tier model and no validation of long-term diagnostic or preventive outcomes.
items.relevance: 连接数字认知测评、血液标志物、聚类和社区医疗实施；更适合作为数字健康产品设计案例，而非成熟诊断算法。

items.title: 认知神经科学硕士
items.title_en: MSc Cognitive Neuroscience
items.summary: 2026 年 9 月入学、全日制一年，官网提供申请入口。训练覆盖 fMRI、MEG、EEG、TMS、编程与数据分析。
items.summary_en: A one-year MSc starting in September 2026. Training includes fMRI, MEG, EEG, TMS, programming, data analysis and an empirical project.
items.relevance: 方法训练覆盖面完整；官网未明确展示本次检索所需的国际生截止日，申请前需向校方核验。

items.title: 数据科学硕士
items.title_en: Master of Data Science
items.summary: 项目允许不同背景通过先修课路径进入，但要求大学层级编程、微积分与线性代数等基础。
items.summary_en: The programme offers flexible entry from different backgrounds, subject to university-level prerequisites in programming, calculus and linear algebra.
items.relevance: 可作为澳洲跨方向选项；资格取决于既有课程能否满足三类先修要求。

items.title: 人脑可能以部分重叠的机制响应预测误差与预测不确定性，从而切分连续事件
items.title_en: Multiple event segmentation mechanisms in the human brain
items.location: 自然情境 fMRI／计算模型
items.summary: 研究用能够预测人类行为的模型分析观看自然电影时的多变量神经模式变化，比较预测误差与预测不确定性对事件边界的作用。结果支持两种信号对应相互重叠但部分不同的脑动态。eLife 评价为“有价值、证据扎实”；局限在于结论依赖模型定义与自然电影范式，尚不能等同于真实生活中的全部事件分割。
items.summary_en: Validated behavioural models were used to analyse multivariate neural-pattern changes during naturalistic movie viewing, testing prediction error versus prediction uncertainty as event-boundary signals. The results support overlapping but partly distinct brain dynamics. eLife rates the work valuable with solid evidence; conclusions still depend on model definitions and the movie-viewing paradigm.
items.relevance: 与情景记忆、时间结构、自然情境认知和计算建模高度相关。

items.title: 香港大学妇产科学系科研助理 I（生育力与体外受精）
items.title_en: Research Assistant I — Fertility and Clinical IVF Research
items.organization: The University of Hong Kong · Department of Obstetrics and Gynaecology
items.summary: 一年期全职岗位，可续约；参与精子生育力、受精和临床体外受精研究。优先生物学、生物医学或健康科学本科，未列出明确工作年限；要求英语及中文（包括粤语），并强调沟通、人际协作和独立工作能力。官方写明 8 月 10 日开始审查，8 月 15 日截止或招满即止。
items.summary_en: A one-year, renewable RA I role supporting sperm-fertility, fertilisation and clinical-IVF research. A bachelor's degree, preferably in biology, biomedical science or health science, is requested with no explicit years-of-experience threshold. English and Chinese including Cantonese, communication and independent/team working skills are required. Review begins 10 August and closes 15 August or earlier if filled.
items.relevance: 学历层级可达且截止较近，但方向偏生殖医学湿实验，粤语与临床团队沟通要求明显；仅作为低优先级生命科学入口，不视为数据／计算路线。

items.title: 信息研究硕士：数据科学方向
items.title_en: MSc Information Studies: Data Science
items.summary: 英文授课的跨学科数据科学方向，强调数据在商业、科学与社会中的解释与应用；2027 申请时间需继续跟踪。
items.summary_en: An English-taught interdisciplinary Data Science track focused on extracting meaning from data across business, science and society; the 2027 timeline remains under watch.
items.relevance: 欧洲大陆中兼顾跨学科背景与数据应用的高质量观察项目。

items.title: 视觉工作记忆以节律方式引导注意：额叶 theta—枕叶 alpha 耦合
items.title_en: Visual working memory guides attention rhythmically in humans
items.summary: 三项实验显示，两个工作记忆项目对注意的引导在约 4–8 Hz theta 节律上交替占优；EEG 提示额叶 theta 相位领先并与枕叶 alpha 耦合。作者据此提出节律项目模板假说，以调和单项目与多项目模板理论。eLife 评价其证据扎实；效应仍需在更多刺激类型和任务中重复。
items.summary_en: Across three experiments, two visual-working-memory items alternated in attentional dominance at theta frequency. EEG linked this to frontal-theta phase leading and coupling with occipital alpha. The rhythmic-item-template account reconciles single- and multiple-template theories. eLife rates the evidence solid, though replication across other stimuli and tasks is still needed.
items.relevance: 直接涉及 theta、alpha、跨频耦合、工作记忆与注意的动态资源分配。

items.title: 香港大学经济与商业策略研究所科研助理 I/II（多个岗位）
items.title_en: Research Assistant I/II — Hong Kong Institute of Economics and Business Strategy
items.organization: The University of Hong Kong · HIEBS
items.summary: 一年期全职科研助理，可续约，负责香港及大湾区的产业多元化、知识产权金融与贸易、结构整合宏观影响等学术和政策研究。接受经济学、公共政策或相关领域本科／硕士，硕士强烈优先；要求中英文书面与口头表达，以及定量、定性研究和编程能力。收到申请即审、招满即止。
items.summary_en: A one-year, renewable RA I/II role conducting academic and policy research on Hong Kong and the Greater Bay Area, including economic diversification, IP finance/trade and macroeconomic effects of structural integration. Applicants should have an undergraduate or preferably master's degree in economics, public policy or a related field, with Chinese/English communication, analytical, programming, quantitative and qualitative research skills. Review is rolling.
items.relevance: 属于低年限数据与政策研究入口，但学科偏好和中英文沟通要求较强，适配度低于技术型科研助理；应先按课程与研究经历判断“相关领域”资格。

items.title: 认知神经科学与人类神经影像硕士
items.title_en: MSc Cognitive Neuroscience and Human Neuroimaging
items.summary: 官网显示 2026 入学申请开放，重点训练 fMRI、EEG、TMS 和神经生理数据分析，并安排独立研究项目。
items.summary_en: Applications are open for 2026 entry, with training in fMRI, EEG, TMS, neurophysiological data analysis and an independent project.
items.relevance: 偏重影像与实验方法，可与同校计算神经科学项目并行比较课程模块及职业出口。

items.title: 人群队列未发现体力活动对海马体积、脑龄或认知的一致正向作用
items.title_en: The effect of physical activity on brain structure and cognitive function in the population-based LIFE-Adult cohort
items.summary: 研究在 LIFE-Adult 人群队列中分析 2,576 人的自报体力活动、海马体积、BrainAGE 及执行功能／处理速度，并在 227 人子样本中加入加速度计数据，结合横断面回归和纵向路径分析。结果没有显示体力活动对这些脑结构或认知指标的一致正向作用；相反，基线脑龄偏高与后续体能较低相关，提示可能存在“脑健康影响活动水平”的反向因果。限制包括自报活动的年龄偏差、客观测量及纵向子样本较小、观察性设计、交叉滞后模型局限，以及脑结局指标范围有限。
items.summary_en: Using the population-based LIFE-Adult cohort, the study analysed self-reported physical activity, hippocampal volume, BrainAGE and processing-speed/executive outcomes in 2,576 participants, with accelerometry in a 227-person subset and longitudinal path analyses. It found no consistent positive association between activity and the selected brain or cognitive outcomes; higher baseline BrainAGE instead predicted lower later physical capacity, suggesting possible reverse causation. Limitations include age-related self-report bias, smaller objective and longitudinal subsamples, observational and cross-lagged design constraints, and a limited set of brain outcomes.
items.relevance: 这是脑龄机器学习指标、海马结构和因果方向判断的高质量反例，可用于避免把“运动与脑健康相关”直接解释为单向保护效应。eLife 评价为“有价值、证据令人信服”。

items.title: 香港大学 SmartRehab 全栈开发／软件工程师（多个岗位）
items.title_en: Full Stack Developer / Software Engineer — SmartRehab
items.organization: The University of Hong Kong · Department of Medicine
items.summary: 为 AI 远程康复平台 SmartRehab 招聘全栈或软件工程人员。技术栈分别偏 PHP/Laravel、React、PostgreSQL、Docker/AWS，或 Swift/iOS、移动 Web 与计算机视觉；经验不足者可按 Research Assistant I/II 考虑。
items.summary_en: Several engineering roles for the AI-powered SmartRehab telerehabilitation platform. Tracks cover PHP/Laravel, React, PostgreSQL and Docker/AWS, or Swift/iOS, mobile web and computer vision. Candidates with less experience may be considered at Research Assistant I/II level.
items.relevance: 这是医疗科技与软件工程的桥接机会，但当前技术栈要求明显高于纯数据分析入门岗，适合作为能力差距参照或在具备作品后申请。

items.title: 靶向海马网络的 TMS 或可选择性改善情景记忆：元分析
items.title_en: A meta-analysis suggests that TMS targeting the hippocampal network selectively improves episodic memory
items.summary: 元分析报告间接靶向海马网络的重复经颅磁刺激可能选择性改善情景记忆、尤其回想成分；作者同时提示异质性与发表偏倚。
items.summary_en: The meta-analysis reports selective improvement in episodic memory—particularly recollection—while noting heterogeneity and signals of publication bias.
items.relevance: 与海马网络、情景记忆和因果神经调控主题直接相关；适合作为研究线索，而非临床效果的确定结论。

items.title: 认知神经科学哲学硕士（2027 入学观察）
items.title_en: MPhil in Cognitive Neurosciences — 2027 watch
items.summary: 2026 入学已关闭。官网暂定 2027 入学于 9 月 10 日开放；美国申请人 Gates 节点为 10 月 15 日，其他资助申请节点为 12 月 2 日。
items.summary_en: The 2026 cycle is closed. Draft dates for 2027 entry indicate opening on 10 September, a 15 October Gates deadline for US applicants and a 2 December funding deadline for others.
items.relevance: 不是今日可提交项目，但可提前准备官网要求的 300 字个人陈述、推荐人与研究匹配说明。

coverage.note: 已复核认知／计算神经科学、神经影像、跨专业数据／AI 项目和入门研究岗位。今日无新的高质量机会；Sussex 国际申请截止仍为 2026-08-01，官方页面显示课程与申请节点仍有效。研究部分新增英国／爱尔兰团队参与的卒中肌肉网络论文。
已扫描德国、荷兰、瑞士、法国、比利时、北欧及 EURAXESS 新发布机会。7 月 23 日结果以教职、项目管理、过期或高学历岗位为主；西班牙神经外科研究支持岗要求硕士且截止 7 月 27 日，未作为可达新增发布。
HKU 7 月 23 日新增三项本科层级 RA：公共卫生实验室 RA I/II、微生物分子诊断／NGS RA I、生殖医学 RA I。均已写明湿实验与粤语门槛；新加坡今日无同等质量机会新增。
已复核英文授课项目、研究生入口及研究岗位；今日无官方确认的高质量新增，东京大学 2027 招生入口继续保留。
已检查高校研究岗位、跨专业项目及国际可达性；今日无新的可达机会。研究部分新增美国团队的精神病结构影像数据驱动分型。
已复核主要数据／AI、神经科学项目及研究岗位入口；今日无高质量新增，墨尔本大学数据科学项目继续保留。

employers.note: 已检查腾讯、字节、阿里、京东等官方入口。腾讯 7 月 23 日更新中可见的大模型、DataOps、全栈等职位经打开具体岗位后多为 2–5 年以上经验或成熟训练／工程能力；相关职位推荐列表中的“1 年以上”并非当前页面本身，未误收录。
已复核 Microsoft、SAP、Siemens、Roche、IBM、Apple 等官方入口；今日未核验到同时满足中国区、低经验、方向匹配且官方页面开放的新岗位。

employers.source: 高校／科研／医疗科技招聘
employers.note: 收录 HKU 7 月 23 日发布的三项本科层级 RA；排除要求硕士、博士、教职或多年项目管理经验，以及与方向明显无关的职位。
已核验 eLife、Molecular Psychiatry、Scientific Reports、Nature Communications、Nature Neuroscience 等官方更新；收录 3 篇 7 月 23 日正式发表、方法和主题匹配度较高的论文。
仅用于发现候选条目；所有最终发布项均回到高校、雇主或期刊官方页面核验。过期、博士后、签证／学历不符和无法官方确认的线索未发布。

excluded_expired_or_ineligible: EURAXESS 中要求硕士且 7 月 27 日截止的西班牙神经外科研究支持岗
腾讯具体岗位页面要求 2–5 年以上经验的大模型、DataOps 与开发职位
限定在校身份或特定毕业届别的实习和校招
外企中国区无法同时满足低经验、方向匹配与官方开放状态的线索
博士后、教职、高级项目管理及无法回到官方页面核验的聚合线索

change_legend.historical_backfill: 较早发布、今日首次发现并补录
change_legend.still_open: 既有条目，今日复核仍开放
change_legend.status_change: 既有条目的截止日、开放状态或资格条件发生变化
